hooks.command: timeout 30 python3 ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/status_manager.py --action session-init 2>/dev/null; echo '✓ SocialForge v1.3 loaded' && echo '' && if [ -n "$GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT" ]; then echo '✓ Image generation: Vertex AI configured (project: '$GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT')'; elif [ -n "$GEMINI_API_KEY" ]; then echo '✓ Image generation: AI Studio configured (fallback — consider Vertex AI for production)'; else echo '⚠ IMAGE GENERATION NOT CONFIGURED' && echo '  No Vertex AI or AI Studio credentials found.' && echo '' && echo '  Option 1 (Recommended — Vertex AI):' && echo '    gcloud services enable aiplatform.googleapis.com' && echo '    gcloud auth application-default login' && echo '    export GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT=your-project-id' && echo '' && echo '  Option 2 (AI Studio fallback):' && echo '    export GEMINI_API_KEY=your-key (https://aistudio.google.com/apikey)' && echo '' && echo '  Without credentials, image generation will FAIL.'; fi && echo '' && if [ -n "$WAVESPEED_API_KEY" ]; then echo '✓ Video generation: WaveSpeed configured (Kling v3.0)'; else echo '○ Video generation: not configured (optional — set WAVESPEED_API_KEY for Kling via WaveSpeed)'; fi && echo '' && echo 'Quick Start:' && echo '  1. /sf:brand-setup   — Configure a brand (do this first, 5-10 min)' && echo '  2. /sf:index-assets  — Index brand photo library (Drive or local)' && echo '  3. /sf:new-month     — Start monthly calendar production' && echo '' && echo 'Already set up? /sf:status | /sf:switch-brand <name>' && echo '' && echo 'Image models: gemini-2.5-flash-image (Nano Banana 2) | gemini-3-pro-image-preview (Nano Banana Pro)' && echo 'Video: Kling v2 via WaveSpeed (image-to-video) | Veo 2.0 via Vertex AI' && echo 'Connectors: 10 HTTP (Notion, Canva, Figma, Slack, Gmail, Calendar, WaveSpeed, Asana, Cloudinary)'

hooks.prompt: If this Write/Edit is creating social media copy or image prompts for SocialForge, check: (1) No banned phrases from brand compliance-rules.json. (2) No fabricated statistics or unsourced claims. (3) Platform character limits respected. (4) Brand hashtags included where required. Otherwise respond 'SKIP'. $ARGUMENTS

If this subagent is working on SocialForge content: (1) Load active brand-config.json — enforce brand colors, fonts, visual style. (2) Brand assets are sacred — AI generates around them, never replaces them. (3) All generated images must be shown to user for approval. (4) Follow the 4 creative modes: ANCHOR_COMPOSE, ENHANCE_EXTEND, STYLE_REFERENCED, PURE_CREATIVE. (5) Respect compliance-rules.json banned phrases and disclaimers. Otherwise respond 'SKIP'. $ARGUMENTS

If this task involved SocialForge content production, verify: (1) All generated images approved by user. (2) Copy respects platform character limits. (3) Brand compliance checked (no banned phrases). (4) Logo overlay applied where required by brand-config. (5) Correct image dimensions for target platforms. If any check fails, list issues and ask how to proceed. Otherwise respond 'PASS'. $ARGUMENTS
